chunks.title: Sign of Maher-shalal-hash-baz
chunks.reason: Narrative account of the prophet taking a wife and bearing a son with a prophetic name.

chunks.title: Oracle Against Damascus and Samaria
chunks.reason: Prophetic declaration regarding the Assyrian invasion as judgment on Israel's alliance.

chunks.title: Call to Trust Yahweh Alone
chunks.reason: Instruction to the prophet and people to fear God rather than political powers.

chunks.title: Sealing the Testimony and Waiting
chunks.reason: Personal declaration of waiting on God and identification as signs for Israel.

chunks.title: Rejection of Mediums and Coming Darkness
chunks.reason: Rhetorical argument contrasting inquiry of the dead with God's law, ending in judgment.
